resources.title: Web Application Development with PHP & MySQL (RTB Level 4)
resources.author: Eng. Niyonsenga Eric
resources.description: An RTB-aligned module covering dynamic web applications: PHP fundamentals, MySQL databases, form handling, sessions, and deploying a school management portal as a capstone project.

feedbacks.author: Mukamana Aline
feedbacks.comment: Very clear examples. The school portal capstone helped me understand sessions and authentication.
